flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southwestern College rose 49% between 2007 and 2010 ($518 → $772).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Southwestern College rose 35% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Southwestern College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.4k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southwestern College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).
